meaning: income generated from business operations (รายได้)
example: Quarterly revenue grew by twelve percent year over year.

meaning: a party with an interest in a project or company (ผู้มีส่วนได้ส่วนเสีย)
example: We aligned all stakeholders before launching the pilot.

meaning: a tangible output a project must produce (สิ่งที่ต้องส่งมอบ)
example: The first deliverable is a working prototype by week six.

meaning: the defined boundaries of work to be done (ขอบเขตงาน)
example: Adding new features would expand the project scope.

meaning: a significant checkpoint in a timeline (หมุดหมายสำคัญ)
example: Reaching ten thousand users was a major milestone.

meaning: the process of obtaining goods and services (การจัดซื้อจัดจ้าง)
example: The procurement team negotiates supplier contracts.

meaning: a document requesting payment for goods or services (ใบแจ้งหนี้)
example: Send the invoice within thirty days of delivery.

meaning: legal responsibility for something, often a debt or obligation (ความรับผิด)
example: The contract limits the vendor's liability to the fees paid.

meaning: security or compensation against loss (การชดใช้ค่าเสียหาย)
example: The supplier agreed to provide indemnity for any IP claims.

meaning: payment or compensation for services (ค่าตอบแทน)
example: Remuneration is payable monthly in arrears.

meaning: funds held by a third party until conditions are met (บัญชีเอสโครว์)
example: The deposit is held in escrow until handover.

meaning: in spite of; despite (โดยไม่คำนึงถึง)
example: Notwithstanding clause 5, either party may terminate for cause.

meaning: in accordance with; under (ตามที่ระบุใน)
example: Payments shall be made pursuant to Schedule A.

meaning: the act of compensating for loss or damage (การชดใช้)
example: The indemnification clause covers third-party claims.

meaning: running a trained model to produce outputs (การอนุมานของโมเดล)
example: Inference latency dropped after we quantized the model.

meaning: further training a model on specific data (การปรับจูนโมเดล)
example: Fine-tuning on domain data improved accuracy.

meaning: when a model generates false but plausible content (การกุข้อมูลของโมเดล)
example: We added citations to reduce hallucination.

meaning: a numeric vector representation of data (เวกเตอร์แทนความหมาย)
example: We store document embeddings in a vector database.

meaning: the amount of work processed per unit of time (อัตราการประมวลผล)
example: Batching requests raised throughput significantly.

meaning: a sequence of automated data or build steps (กระบวนการทำงานต่อเนื่อง)
example: The preprocessing pipeline cleans data before training.

meaning: when a model learns training noise and fails to generalize (การโอเวอร์ฟิต)
example: Regularization helped prevent overfitting.

meaning: in Genshin lore, a gem granting elemental power (วิชั่น/ตาเทพ)
example: Only those with a Vision can wield elemental power.

meaning: raising a character's level cap and stats (การแอสเซนชัน)
example: Ascension materials are farmed from world bosses.

meaning: a ruling deity of a nation in the game's lore (เทพอาร์คอน)
example: Each nation is governed by an Archon.

meaning: in Identity V, working a cipher machine to progress (ถอดรหัส)
example: Survivors must decode five ciphers to open the gates.

meaning: to evade the hunter by running a controlled path (เลี้ยงระยะหนีฮันเตอร์)
example: A good survivor can kite the hunter around tall objects.

meaning: for the hunter to chase one survivor relentlessly (ไล่จี้คนเดียว)
example: Getting tunneled early can lose the match.

meaning: to move the team to another site or area (ย้ายตำแหน่ง)
example: They rotated to B after faking a push on A.

meaning: to win a round alone against the odds (พลิกสถานการณ์)
example: He clutched the round in a one-versus-three.

meaning: full combo: clearing a map without breaking combo (เล่นจบไม่หลุดคอมโบ)
example: She finally got an FC on that stream map.

meaning: accuracy; how precisely notes are hit (ความแม่นยำ)
example: His acc is high even on fast streams.

meaning: not gonna lie; being honest (พูดตรง ๆ)
example: Ngl, that boss fight was harder than expected.

meaning: somewhat; quietly (แอบ ๆ / นิด ๆ)
example: I'm lowkey obsessed with this event.

meaning: to deal with something difficult; (slang) to be in denial (ทำใจ/ปลอบใจตัวเอง)
example: Saying the nerf doesn't matter is just cope.

meaning: wildly chaotic or unrestrained, often affectionately (บ้าพลัง/หลุดโลก)
example: His stream got completely unhinged after the jumpscare.

meaning: cozy and relaxing, used for chill streams (สบาย ๆ ผ่อนคลาย)
example: Azeru's late-night streams have a comfy vibe.

meaning: game: send units/abilities; tech: release software; business: allocate resources (ใช้งานได้หลายบริบท)
example: We deploy the model to production after testing; in game you deploy your ult; the firm deployed capital into new markets.

meaning: game: difficulty/stat growth; business: grow capacity efficiently (ขยายขนาด/เติบโต)
example: The enemy scales with your level; the startup needs to scale operations.

meaning: game: dominant strategy; business: prevailing approach in a field (แนวทางที่นิยม/ได้เปรียบ)
example: That comp is the current meta; agile became the management meta.

meaning: game: repeat tasks for rewards; slang: relentless hard work (ฟาร์ม/ขยันหามรุ่งหามค่ำ)
example: I grinded artifacts all weekend; she's on the startup grind.

meaning: osu: pp score metric; business: measured output against goals (ผลงาน/ตัวชี้วัด)
example: His pp reflects raw performance; the team reviews quarterly performance.
